# 12b Terminology — Mid-Frequency Codelists — questionnaires subdir (Stage v2.5)

Mid-frequency CDISC controlled terminology codelists sourced from ``knowledge_base/terminology/questionnaires/``. Each codelist keeps a compact 3-column Term table (Code / Submission Value / Definition) with Definitions truncated to 100 characters at word boundaries. Synonyms and NCI Concept Description links are omitted at this tier to fit the capacity budget. "Related Domains" is a codelist-level metadata line listing SDTM domains whose spec.md references the codelist C-code.
